# terrible_community_general_scaleway_lb (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Description of the load-balancer.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the load-balancer.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization identifier.
- `region` (String) Scaleway zone.

### Optional

- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the instance.
- `tags` (String) List of tags to apply to the load-balancer.
- `wait` (Boolean) Wait for the load-balancer to reach its desired state before returning.
- `wait_sleep_time` (Number) Time to wait before every attempt to check the state of the load-balancer.
- `wait_timeout` (Number) Time to wait for the load-balancer to reach the expected state.

### Read-Only

- `scaleway_lb` (String) The load-balancer object.
